message:
Fix wake-outside-lock across async primitives and add missing env guards

Refactor waker wake() calls to occur after releasing the mutex in:
- fs/uring.rs mark_op_complete
- grpc/client.rs ResponseStream::push/close
- net/tcp/virtual_tcp.rs VirtualTcpListener inject/close and injector
- time/sleep.rs Sleep worker thread

This prevents potential deadlocks or priority inversions when waking
a task while still holding a mutex that the woken task might need.

Also in grpc/client.rs: fix encode_grpc_timeout to prefer exact-divisor
units before falling back to ceiling division, improving timeout header
precision. Add ClientInterceptor and MetadataInterceptor to grpc module
re-exports. Remove unnecessary .clone() in test assertion.

Simplify combinator/select.rs polling: remove eager poll-both pattern
in favor of standard short-circuit (poll a, then poll b if pending).

Add missing test_utils::env_lock() guards in config.rs, test_logging.rs,
and test_ndjson.rs to prevent flaky failures from concurrent env var
mutation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
